hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | python -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); echo "$FILE" | grep -qiE '[/\\]\.claude[/\\]rules[/\\].*\.md$' && echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Rule files (.claude/rules/*.md) are managed by /r and /j only. Do not edit them directly."}' || true

npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -3 | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/.*error.*/{ "systemMessage": "TypeScript errors introduced — fix before continuing." }/' | grep -q systemMessage && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -3 | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/.*error.*/{ "systemMessage": "TypeScript errors introduced — fix before continuing." }/' || echo '{}'
